home.title: NeuralUI — Angular Design System
home.subtitle: High-quality components with Signals and OnPush, production-ready.

hero.subtitle: Modern Angular component library, built with Signals, OnPush and URL state. No external dependencies.

components.button: Button with 4 variants, 3 sizes and loading state
components.card: Content surface with header, body and footer
components.input: Text field with floating label and validation
components.select: Custom dropdown with keyboard and Forms support
components.table: Table with URL-driven search, sort and pagination

urlState.label: URL State
urlState.desc: Search, pagination and sorting stored in the browser bar.

accessible.label: Accessible
accessible.desc: ARIA roles, keyboard navigation and focus management.

tokens.label: CSS Design Tokens
tokens.desc: CSS variables for colors, spacing, shadows and typography.

theming.title: Theming
theming.subtitle: Customize NeuralUI by overriding CSS variables. No build configuration needed.
theming.intro: NeuralUI is built on a Design Token system implemented as native CSS variables. To customize any visual aspect, simply override the variables in your global stylesheet.

howto.title: How to apply a theme
howto.desc: Add these variables to your styles.scss or any CSS selector. Changes are applied instantly without recompiling the library.

dark.title: Dark mode
dark.desc: Dark theme is activated by adding the data-theme="dark" attribute to the root element. NeuralUI applies it automatically when you use the built-in toggle.

custom.title: Custom theme
custom.desc: You can create a completely different theme by overriding the variables in :root. For example, a corporate green theme:

templates.title: Premium Templates
templates.subtitle: Dashboards and landing pages built with NeuralUI.

form.title: Form Controls
form.subtitle: Textarea, Switch, Checkbox and Radio with ControlValueAccessor.

feedback.title: Feedback Pro
feedback.subtitle: Tooltip and Toast for high-end dashboards.

install.title: Installation
install.desc: Add NeuralUI to your Angular project in 4 steps. No heavy external dependencies.

step1.title: Install the package
step1.desc: One command. Lucide icons are bundled automatically.
step1.note: @angular/cdk is a peer dependency; install it if you do not have it already.

step2.title: Configure providers
step2.desc: Register icons and configure providers in app.config.ts.

step3.title: Import styles
step3.desc: Import the design tokens (required) and each component stylesheet you use.

step4.title: Use your first component
step4.desc: Import the component in your standalone module and use it in the template.

cta.title: Have ideas? Contribute.
cta.desc: NeuralUI is open source. Open a PR or check the repository on GitHub.

accordion.desc: Expandable panels with smooth animation. Supports multiple mode, disabled panels and complete ARIA accessibility.

avatar.desc: Circular or square component for profile pictures or initials. Supports 5 sizes, 6 colors, presence indicator and automatic fallback if the image fails.

badge.desc: Compact status labels with 5 semantic variants, dot indicator and outline support.

breadcrumb.desc: Accessible hierarchical navigation with RouterLink support, customizable separators and aria-current="page" indicator on the last item.

button.desc: Semantic button with 4 variants, 3 sizes, animated loading state and full accessibility support (aria-disabled, role="button").

card.desc: Surface container with structured content projection: header, body and footer. 4 padding modes, hoverable, flat and bordered variants.

chart.desc: Reactive charts powered by ApexCharts with Neural-Blue aesthetics. Grouped, stacked, horizontal bars, area, pie, donut and Pareto diagram — all with integrated colors, tooltip and legend.

checkbox.desc: Animated checkbox with full Angular Forms support.

chip.desc: Compact selectable and removable labels. Perfect for filters, tags and visual multi-selection with signals support.

dateInput.desc: Date, time and date+time field with icon, consistent system styling and full Angular Forms support.

divider.desc: Visual separator for content sections. Supports horizontal and vertical orientation, and a centered label.

input.desc: Text field with floating label, icons and full Angular Forms support (ngModel and Reactive Forms). Stable IDs for SSR and a11y.

modal.desc: Accessible dialog with CDK Overlay, focus trap, Escape to close and support for sm, md, lg and fullscreen sizes.

dialog.desc: Accessible dialog with CDK Overlay, focus trap, Escape to close and support for sm, md, lg and fullscreen sizes.

multiselect.desc: Multi-selection dropdown with chips, integrated search and full Angular Forms support. Footer summary and one-click clear.

nav.desc: Persistent navigation sidebar with support for submenus, badges, collapsed mode (64 px ↔ 280 px) and accessible tooltips on icons.

pagination.desc: Accessible pagination with automatic ellipsis, keyboard navigation and signal-managed state.

progressBar.desc: Accessible progress bar with 4 semantic variants, 3 sizes, indeterminate mode and real-time value label.

radio.desc: Single-selection option group with full Angular Forms support.

rating.desc: Star rating selector. Supports half-star values, read-only mode and keyboard navigation.

select.desc: Custom dropdown with floating label, keyboard support and full Angular Forms integration. Auto-closes on outside click.

sidebar.desc: Side panel whose open/closed state lives in the URL (?menu=open). Overlay mode on mobile, persistent on desktop ≥400px. State is shareable and synced via NeuUrlStateService.

skeleton.desc: Animated placeholders to simulate content loading. Three variants: text, circle and rectangle.

slider.desc: Accessible slider built on native input[type=range] with custom styles, unit support and signals.

splitButton.desc: Primary button with secondary actions dropdown. Full ARIA, keyboard navigation, loading spinner and 5 visual variants.

statsCard.desc: Metric card with main value, animated trend and subtitle. Ideal for analytics dashboards.

stepper.desc: Step-by-step wizard with free or linear navigation, completion state and imperative methods next() / prev().

switch.desc: Animated toggle compatible with Angular Forms. Ideal for enabling/disabling options.

table.desc: Advanced data table with URL-synced search, sorting and pagination via NeuUrlStateService. Multi-row selection, loading skeleton and mobile-optimized horizontal scroll.

tabs.desc: Tab system with URL-synced state. Animated indicator, badges, disabled tabs and flush mode.

textarea.desc: Text area with floating label, optional auto-resize and full Angular Forms support.

timeline.desc: Chronological event list with 5 semantic variants, timestamps and animated connector line.

toggleButton.desc: Single or multi-selection button group with full Angular Forms support. A superior alternative to PrimeNG's SelectButton.

tooltip.desc: [neuTooltip] directive using CDK Overlay. Responds to hover and focus.
tooltip.top: Tooltip on top — great for action icons

toast.desc: Floating notifications. Mobile: bottom center. Desktop: top right corner.

emptyState.desc: Configurable empty state with optional SVG illustration, title, description and CTA.

textarea_form.desc: Textarea with floating label and optional auto-resize support.
textarea_form.label: Description

switch_form.desc: Animated toggle with Electric-Blue. Compatible with Reactive Forms.

checkbox_form.terms: I accept the terms and conditions

radio_form.desc: Single-selection group. The group implements ControlValueAccessor.

footer.note: The showcase source code is for educational use. The @neural-ui/core library is proprietary software.
